case_title: 57 TAYLOR I7, LP VS. REBECCA ELLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP SERVED JUN-20-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP AS TO DEFENDANT ELLER, REBECCA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLER, REBECCA AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR STREET, #350, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
